_doc: Canonical material category list. The 'category' field of each entry in materials.json should be one of the 'id' values below. Categories are free strings — this file is documentation, not enforcement — but new entries should reuse an existing id rather than invent a new one.

categories.name: Obra gruesa
categories.examples: cemento, cal, hidrófugos, nylon de obra

categories.name: Áridos
categories.examples: arena, piedra partida, canto rodado, pedregullo

categories.name: Placas y aislantes
categories.examples: Durlock, Aquapanel, lana de vidrio, EPS, vinílicos

categories.name: Perfilería
categories.examples: montantes, soleras, perfil T, molduras, zócalos

categories.name: Cielorraso (Durlock / suspendido)
categories.examples: placa Durlock, perfil omega, soleras de techo

categories.name: Plomería
categories.examples: caños, llaves de paso, calefones, termotanques

categories.name: Electricidad
categories.examples: cables, llaves, tomas, tableros, bandeja portacable

categories.name: Iluminación
categories.examples: spots LED, plafones, perfiles LED, dicroicas, cardánicas
